## edu-cli class bind-syllabus

Bind a syllabus to a teaching class (为教学班绑定syllabus)

```
edu-cli class bind-syllabus [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --class-id uint      Class ID (required)
  -h, --help               help for bind-syllabus
      --syllabus-id uint   Syllabus ID (required)
```
